channel.title: 2 Timothy on Christian Internet Resources
channel.description: Recent content in 2 Timothy on Christian Internet Resources

item.title: 2 Timothy 1
item.description:
2 Timothy Chapter 1

            1 Paul, apostle of-Christ Jesus by (the) will of-God according-to (the) promise of-life [the] in Christ Jesus, 2 to-Timothy, beloved son.  Grace, mercy, peace from God (the) Father and Christ Jesus the Lord of-us.

            3 I-have grace to-[the] God, whom I-serve from (my) forefathers with (a) clear conscience, as I┘constantly└have the remembrance concerning you in the prayers of-me night and day, 4 longing to-see you, remembering the tears of-you in-order-that I-might-be-filled with-joy, 5 taking remembrance of-the sincere faith in you, which first resided in the grandmother of-you, Lois, and the mother of-you, Eunice, and I-have-been-persuaded that also (is) in you.  6 On-account-of which reason I-remind you to-stir-up-into-a-flame/to-stir-up the spiritual-gift of-[the] God that is in you through the laying-on of-the hands of-me.  7 For [the] God did┘not└give us (a) spirit of cowardice/timidity, but of-power and love and self-control.  8 So do┘not└be-ashamed-of the mystery of-the Lord of-us nor me, the prisoner of-him, but suffer-with (me), for-the gospel according-to (the) power of-God, 9 the-One having-saved us and having-called (us) with-(a)-holy calling, not according-to the works of-us, but according-to his-own purpose and grace, the-one having-been-given to-us in Christ Jesus before times eternal, 10 and/but now having-been-revealed by the appearing of-the Savior of-us Christ Jesus, (the-One) having-destroyed death [on-the-one-hand] and having-brought-to-light life and immortality through the gospel, 11 to which I was-appointed (a) preacher and apostle and teacher, 12 on-account-of which reason also I-suffer these-things.  But I-am┘not└ashamed, for I-know whom I-have-believed and have-been-persuaded that he-is able to-keep the entrusted-matter of-me to that [the] day.  13 Have (the) pattern of-sound words that you-heard from me in (the) faith and love [the] in Christ Jesus.  14 By the Holy Spirit [the] residing in us, keep the good matter-entrusted to-you.

item.title: 2 Timothy 2
item.description:
2 Timothy Chapter 2

         2:1You then, my son, be-strong in the grace [the] in Christ Jesus, 2 and what-things you-heard from me through many witnesses—these-things entrust to-faithful men who will-be able to-teach others.  3 Suffer-hardship-with (me) as (a) good soldier of-Christ Jesus.  4 Nobody, serving-as-a-soldier, gets-mixed-up-in the affairs of-[the] everyday-life, in-order-that he-may-please the-one having-recruited-(him)-as-a-soldier.  5 And also if anybody competes-as-an-athlete, he-does┘not└win-the-crown unless2 he competes according-to-the-rules/legally.  6 It-is-necessary-for the laboring farmer to-share-in the crops first.  7 Think-over what I-am-saying, for the Lord will-give you understanding in all-things.

item.title: 2 Timothy 3
item.description:
2 Timothy Chapter 3

            1 Now know this:  that in (the) last days hard times will-be-present.  2 For [the] men will-be self-lovers, lovers-of-silver, boasters, arrogant, slanderers, disobedient to-parents, ungrateful, not-lovers-of-good, 3 lacking-natural-affection, heartless, malicious-gossiping-ones, without-self-control, vicious, not-loving-good, 4 treacherous, reckless, having-been-puffed-up-with-pride, lovers-of-pleasure rather than lovers-of-God, 5 having the/a form of-godliness but having-denyed the power of-it, and avoid these-(men).  6 For out-of these are the-ones sneaking-into [the] houses and seducing morally-weak-women having-been-weighed-down with sins, led-on by-various desires, 7 always learningfem, and never able to-come to (a) knowledge of-(the)-truth.  8 And in-the-same-way2 Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses, so also these oppose the truth, men having-been-corrupted with-regard-to-the mind, rejected concerning the faith.  9 But they-will┘not└progress on further, for the foolishness of-them will-be clear to-all, as also the (foolishness) of-those-(men) became (clear).

item.title: 2 Timothy 4
item.description:
2 Timothy Chapter 4

            1 I-solemnly-charge (you) before [the] God and Christ Jesus, the-One going to-judge (the) living and (the) dead, and with-respect-to-the appearing of-him and the kingdom of-him:   2 preach the word, be-ready in season (and) out-of-season; refute, rebuke, encourage with all longsuffering and teaching.  3 For (the) time will-be when they-will┘not└put-up-with/endure [the] sound teaching; but according-to [the] their-own desires, they-will-accumulate for-themselves teachers itchingnom with-respect-to-the what-they-hear, 4 and will-wander-off-from/turn-away-from the truth with-respect-to-the message, and will turn-aside to [the] myths.  5But you be-self-controlled in all-things, suffer-hardship, do (the) work of-(an)-evangelist, fulfill the ministry of-you.
